title: Add DSN normalization and driver regression tests for SQLite
body:
## Background

From PR #314 code review finding: Switching to modernc.org/sqlite changes DSN behavior. While the current implementation handles plain paths and `:memory:` correctly, callers might pass driver-specific DSNs that could behave differently.

## Suggested Solution

1. Add an adapter layer or validation around dbPath/DSN
2. Document and normalize expected formats (plain file paths and `:memory:` only)
3. Add targeted tests for NewStore with:
   - `:memory:`
   - Temp file path
   - Path with existing query params
   - Invalid DSN formats

## Affected Files

- internal/adapter/store/sqlite/store.go

## Labels

bug, testing
